name: io.github.buildkite/buildkite-mcp-server
description: Official MCP server exposing the Buildkite API (pipelines, builds, jobs, logs, tests) to MCP clients.

environmentVariables.name: BUILDKITE_API_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Buildkite API access token used for authentication. Create one at https://buildkite.com/user/api-access-tokens.
